notifications.turn: It's your turn at the table

notice.intro: Welcome to Transcendance — the foosball match management system for the 42 cohort. Here's how to use the site.

sections.title: 🏓 Playing a match
sections.body: Join the queue from the "Queue" page. Choose your mode (Chill or Competitive), your format (1v1, 2v2 or Solo), then wait for an opponent. A notification will alert you when your match starts.

sections.title: 🪙 Tokens
sections.body: You earn tokens by playing and winning matches. You can use them to bet on other players' matches from the Bets page. Tokens won on bets are credited immediately.

sections.title: 🏆 Tournaments
sections.body: Tournaments are organised by the BDE. You can register alone (waiting list to form a team) or with a partner. The format is 2-player teams. The bracket is revealed at the tournament start.

sections.title: 📊 ELO
sections.body: ELO is your ranking score. It increases when you win and decreases when you lose. Chill mode matches don't affect ELO. 1v1 and 2v2 rankings are independent.

sections.title: 📅 The Queue
sections.body: From the Queue page, you can see ongoing and upcoming matches. The pencil icon on your slot lets you edit or cancel your match. You can also bet on others' matches by hovering over them.

gdpr.title: Confirmation required

gdpr.confirmDelete: Enter it to confirm account deletion.
gdpr.sendFailed: Failed to send the code. Try again.

register.title: BABYFOOT 42
register.subtitle: Create your account to join the platform

s1.title: 1. Who are we?
s1.body: Babyfoot42 is an internal platform at École 42 for managing foosball: planning, seasonal ELO rankings, virtual token betting, and BDE-organized tournaments. This policy describes what data is collected, how it is used, and what your rights are.

s2.title: 2. Data collected
items: Account — username (42 login or chosen freely), email address, hashed and salted password (PBKDF2).
Profile — avatar (optional), online status.
Authentication — 42 OAuth ID (if logging in via the 42 intranet), encrypted TOTP secret (if 2FA is enabled).
Game activity — match history, scores, ELO changes, statistics (wins, losses, gamelles, demis).
Betting — bets placed, winnings/losses, token wallet balance, transaction history.
Planning — reserved slots, queue positions.
Tournaments — registrations, tournament match results.
Technical logs — IP address, login timestamps (retained for 30 days maximum).

s3.title: 3. Purposes
items: Provide the platform features (ranking, planning, betting, tournaments).
Ensure account security (authentication, 2FA, abuse detection).
Calculate and display the ELO ranking in real time.
Manage the virtual token wallet and associated transactions.
Moderate the platform (admin/BDE role).

s4.title: 4. Legal basis
s4.body: Processing is based on your consent at account creation and on the platform's legitimate interest in security and proper service operation.

s5.title: 5. Storage and security
items: Data is stored in a PostgreSQL database hosted locally on École 42 servers.
Passwords are never stored in plain text (PBKDF2 + salt).
All communications are encrypted via HTTPS (TLS 1.2/1.3).
Automatic backups are performed every night.
Database access is restricted to internal services only.

s6.title: 6. Data sharing
s6.body: Your data is never sold or shared with third parties. Only the 42 OAuth flow involves exchanging information with the 42 intranet (login, email) at initial sign-in.

s7.title: 7. Your rights (GDPR)
items: Access and export — export all your data (profile, matches, bets, transactions) as JSON or CSV from your settings.
Rectification — change your username and avatar from your settings.
Deletion — request account deletion from your settings. Your personal data will be anonymised.
Opposition — disable 2FA and revoke OAuth login from your settings.

s8.title: 8. Cookies
s8.body: The platform uses a single JWT session cookie (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Lax) strictly necessary for authentication. No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.

s9.title: 9. Contact
s9.body: For any questions about your data, use the ticket form in the footer or contact the team via the 42 intranet.

s1.title: 1. Purpose
s1.body: These terms govern the use of Babyfoot42, an internal platform at École 42 for managing foosball. By creating an account, you agree to these terms in full.

s2.title: 2. Access to the platform
items: The platform is reserved for students, alumni, and staff of École 42.
Each person may only have one account. Creating multiple accounts is prohibited.
You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential.
The platform is accessible via HTTPS only.

s3.title: 3. Fair play rules
items: Betting on your own matches is prohibited.
Any attempt to manipulate results, the ranking, or the betting system is prohibited.
Match results must be entered honestly. Cheating may result in a suspension.
Respect for other players is mandatory. Abusive behaviour will be sanctioned.

s4.title: 4. Virtual tokens and betting
items: Tokens are a virtual currency with no real monetary value. They cannot be exchanged, sold, or converted into money.
Each new account receives an initial token balance.
Additional tokens can be earned by winning bets or finishing in the top of the leaderboard at the end of a season.
Bets are final once placed. Refunds are only issued if a match is cancelled by an administrator.

s5.title: 5. Rankings and seasons
items: The ranking is based on ELO calculated from validated matches.
Seasons are created and closed by administrators. Closing a season triggers reward distribution and an ELO reset.
Past season histories are preserved and viewable.

s6.title: 6. Planning and reservations
items: Reservation slots are limited to ensure fair access for everyone.
A no-show reservation may result in a penalty (loss of queue position).
The waiting queue is managed automatically and visible to all connected users.

s7.title: 7. Tournaments
items: Tournaments are organized by the BDE (student association) of École 42.
Registering for a tournament commits the participant to being available for all their matches.
Tournament match results are recorded by the organizer and cannot be modified by players.

s8.title: 8. Moderation and sanctions
items: Administrators may temporarily suspend or permanently ban any account for violation of these terms.
In case of a ban, the token balance and history are retained but the account is no longer accessible.
Any dispute may be submitted via the ticket form.

s9.title: 9. Service availability
s9.body: The platform is provided as-is, without guarantee of continuous availability. Maintenance may be performed without notice.

s10.title: 10. Changes to terms
s10.body: These terms may be updated at any time. Users are notified via an in-app notification in case of substantial changes.

s11.title: 11. Contact
s11.body: For any questions or complaints, use the ticket form in the footer or contact the team via the 42 intranet.

ticket.title: Submit a ticket
ticket.intro: Something not working? Describe the problem and we'll take care of it.
ticket.desc_placeholder: Describe what you observed, the steps to reproduce the issue, and what you expected to happen...
ticket.drop_text: Click or drag your images here
ticket.success_sub: Thanks for your feedback. The team will look into it shortly.
